rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Ritual / practice (as noun) / ceremony — hard ban in any curriculum or training surface.
Credit the original when paraphrasing a named technique.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Line 26 'we don't mock the database' exempt: italicized example artifact written in student-team voice (allowed exception in rule 6 author-we sub-rule).

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: Always "you", never "the student"; teacher framing stays out of body.
Earn every technical term on first use.
rules_evaluated.fix_hint: Rule 2(b) re-amended 2026-05-09 (second pass): bare MN allowed at M2 or later in the training's arc. This is the M3 exercise file — bare M3/M4/M6 in body PASS as curriculum-wide convention.

rules_evaluated.rule_lead: No time-of-day anchors in body prose.
